status: private research prototype planning packet; not measured or build-ready
honesty_gate: Formulas and starter visuals are first-order planning aids only; final acceptance requires measured shell data, measured tuning, and human review.
remaining_unknowns: No tuned handpan shell measurements are recorded.
Dimple geometry, shoulder shape, and hammer sequence are tuner-defined and measurement-required.
Heat treatment and surface treatment are supplier/process dependent.
Gu response, cross-talk, sustain, partial balance, and post-settle drift are unmeasured.
No MCP-generated CAD, render, hero image, exploded diagram, or annotated print plate was produced in this patch.
